description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 2 review/audit cluster. Pins whole-repo auditing apart from diff review, subsystem analysis, and cleanup application.

cases.prompt: Board wants technical due diligence on the target company's repository before we sign — everything: architecture, security, tests, dependencies, deployability.
cases.reason: Entire-repository scope across all dimensions with due-diligence stakes — the inventory-first audit.

cases.prompt: From that audit, drill into the ingestion pipeline specifically — is it salvageable and in what order would we fix it?
cases.reason: Scope has narrowed to one subsystem with a fix-first decision attached — the analyst consumes the audit's inventory.

cases.prompt: The vendor sent a patch as a PR against their repo — review the diff before we accept it.
cases.reason: A single change-set with a merge decision — diff review, not a repo audit.

cases.prompt: The audit flagged utils/legacy_export.py as dead-code-heavy. Strip the dead paths out of it, behavior unchanged.
cases.reason: Applying a named behavior-preserving cleanup — the audit is read-only and never edits.
